cards.name: The Magician
cards.meaning_up: Focused intention, skill, and aligned action.
cards.meaning_rev: Scattered focus, hesitation, or unused potential.
cards.desc: A major arcana card used as an example of the tarotapi.dev-compatible import shape.

cards.name: Eight of Swords
cards.meaning_up: Feeling limited, pausing to see what choices are still available.
cards.meaning_rev: A gradual release from limiting thoughts or old assumptions.
cards.desc: A minor arcana card used as an example of the tarotapi.dev-compatible import shape.
